source_pr.title: executor: skip the unstable test.
source_pr.body: Multiple package runs on the same process in parallel, we can't make sure the test always pass.

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR marks the test as 'not stable' by adding a Skip, but it does not include a targeted stabilization mechanism or a concrete flaky failure signature/root-cause evidence beyond the skip. We therefore keep a conservative fallback classification.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: executor: skip the unstable test.
